entries.title: Claude in Excel: Building Financial Models Directly in Spreadsheets
entries.summary: You can now prototype and iterate financial models faster by using Claude natively in Excel rather than copying formulas back and forth between an AI chat interface and your spreadsheet.

entries.title: Power Query for Finance Automation: One-Click Dashboard Refresh
entries.summary: Switch to Power Query for financial consolidation to turn a 3-hour manual monthly task into a 10-second refresh, reducing errors and freeing time for actual analysis.

entries.title: ChatGPT for FP&A Workflows: Automating Variance Analysis, Forecasting, and Reports
entries.summary: Structure ChatGPT requests as an FP&A analyst taking on specific jobs (variance analysis, consolidation, narrative), and feed it your actual Excel data to automate repetitive reporting in minutes rather than hours.

entries.title: Board Forecast Presentation: Visual Storytelling and Multi-Scenario Planning
entries.summary: Structure board forecast presentations around a clear decision or outcome rather than information dump, and pre-wire key stakeholders to surface objections before the meeting.

entries.title: Managing Difficult Conversations with Business Partners: Preparation and Collaborative Framing
entries.summary: Before a tough conversation with a business partner about budget or spending, identify the root financial problem, define what 'win' looks like for both sides, and hold it live to read tone and build collaborative momentum.
